meta.title: Reprint Push Remote Changed
meta.description: Live source WordPress site after independent remote edits.
meta.author: Reprint Push Lab

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $shared_id = wp_insert_post(array('import_id'=>1001,'post_title'=>'Shared base post','post_name'=>'shared-base-post','post_content'=>'Remote edited content','post_status'=>'publish','post_author'=>1)); add_post_meta($shared_id, 'reprint_push_fixture', 'shared', true); $remote_id = wp_insert_post(array('import_id'=>3001,'post_title'=>'Remote-only announcement','post_name'=>'remote-only-announcement','post_content'=>'Created on source after pull','post_status'=>'publish','post_author'=>1)); add_post_meta($remote_id, 'reprint_push_fixture', 'remote-only', true); $dir = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/uploads/reprint-push'; wp_mkdir_p($dir); file_put_contents($dir . '/shared.txt', 'remote upload content'); file_put_contents($dir . '/remote-only.txt', 'remote-only upload content'); update_option('reprint_push_plugin_payload', array('owner'=>'forms','mode'=>'remote-edited','version'=>3));
